PowerShell($procs = netstat -ano | Select-String ':5173' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'LISTENING' }; $procs; $pid5173 = \($procs[0] -split '\\s+'\)[-1]; Get-Process -Id $pid5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path)

Bash(node -e 'const { PrismaClient } = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); Promise.all\([p.productHowItWorksStep.count\(\), p.productTip.count\(\), p.productTechSpec.count\(\), p.productHighlight.count\(\)]\).then\(\([a,b,c,d]\) => { console.log\('\\''howItWorksSteps:'\\'', a\); console.log\('\\''tips:'\\'', b\); console.log\('\\''techSpecs:'\\'', c\); console.log\('\\''highlights:'\\'', d\); p.$disconnect\(\); }\);')

Bash(node -e 'const { PrismaClient } = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); async function main\(\) { const counts = await Promise.all\([p.productHowItWorksStep.count\(\), p.productTip.count\(\), p.productTechSpec.count\(\), p.productHighlight.count\(\)]\); console.log\('\\''howItWorksSteps:'\\'', counts[0]\); console.log\('\\''tips:'\\'', counts[1]\); console.log\('\\''techSpecs:'\\'', counts[2]\); console.log\('\\''highlights:'\\'', counts[3]\); await p.$disconnect\(\); } main\(\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\); }\);')

Bash(node -e 'const { PrismaClient } = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); async function main\(\) { const prod = await p.product.findUnique\({ where: { id: '\\''scale'\\'' }, include: { howItWorksSteps: { orderBy: { displayOrder: '\\''asc'\\'' } }, tips: { orderBy: { displayOrder: '\\''asc'\\'' } }, techSpecs: { orderBy: { displayOrder: '\\''asc'\\'' } }, highlights: { orderBy: { displayOrder: '\\''asc'\\'' } } } }\); console.log\('\\''Steps:'\\'', prod.howItWorksSteps.length, '\\''| Tips:'\\'', prod.tips.length, '\\''| Specs:'\\'', prod.techSpecs.length, '\\''| Highlights:'\\'', prod.highlights.length\); console.log\('\\''First step:'\\'', prod.howItWorksSteps[0].title, '\\''-'\\'', prod.howItWorksSteps[0].description.slice\(0,40\)\); console.log\('\\''First tip:'\\'', prod.tips[0].tipText.slice\(0,50\)\); console.log\('\\''First spec:'\\'', prod.techSpecs[0].specGroup, '\\''|'\\'', prod.techSpecs[0].specLabel, '\\'':'\\'', prod.techSpecs[0].specValue\); console.log\('\\''First highlight:'\\'', prod.highlights[0].highlightText\); await p.$disconnect\(\); } main\(\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\); }\);')

Bash(node -e 'const { PrismaClient } = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); async function main\(\) { const prod = await p.product.findUnique\({ where: { id: '\\''complete-essentials'\\'' }, include: { highlights: { orderBy: { displayOrder: '\\''asc'\\'' } }, bundleItems: { orderBy: { displayOrder: '\\''asc'\\'' }, include: { component: { include: { howItWorksSteps: { orderBy: { displayOrder: '\\''asc'\\'' } }, tips: { orderBy: { displayOrder: '\\''asc'\\'' } }, techSpecs: { orderBy: { displayOrder: '\\''asc'\\'' } } } } } } } }\); console.log\('\\''Bundle highlights:'\\'', prod.highlights.length\); prod.bundleItems.forEach\(bi => { const c = bi.component; console.log\(c.id, '\\''-> steps:'\\'', c.howItWorksSteps.length, '\\''| tips:'\\'', c.tips.length, '\\''| specs:'\\'', c.techSpecs.length\); }\); await p.$disconnect\(\); } main\(\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\); }\);')
Bash(dir "C:\\Users\\HP\\Desktop\\Final Total Care Store Front\\src\\assets\\product-explore\\" /b 2>nul | sort)
